name: Francisco Lopez
learned: Francisco Lopez is an actor and comedian who loves to entertain others. They are always looking for new ways to make people laugh.
currently: Francisco Lopez is working on a web series about life in a co-living space. They are also exploring improvisational comedy classes.
lifestyle: Francisco Lopez goes to bed around 11pm, awakes up around 7am, eats dinner around 6pm.
living_area: the Ville:artist's co-living space:Francisco Lopez's room
daily_req: wake up and complete the morning routine at 8:00 am
continue with some script writing for the web series from 9:00 am to 11:00 am
attend an improvisational comedy class from 11:30 am to 1:30 pm
have lunch and relax from 1:30 pm to 2:30 pm
work on rehearsals for the web series from 3:00 pm to 5:00 pm
prepare and have dinner around 6:00 pm
take some time for leisure activities such as watching a comedy show or reading from 7:00 pm to 8:30 pm
brainstorm new ideas for upcoming performances or sketches from 8:30 pm to 10:00 pm
